data.name: Breeze of Passion
data.detailed_description:
You play the role of a young guy from a normal family who suddenly got appointed as the general manager of a small hotel, located in the centre of a sunny seaside town.
The owner of the hotel is an experienced businesswoman and a family friend.
She wants you to grow the business using any means necessary.



You were skeptical about the idea at first, but it turned out that the town was full of hot girls and MILFs.
Now you have to constantly balance between adventures, unexpected encounters, and tons of hot sex…



Breeze of Passion is an open world, choice-driven adult Visual Novel.
You can move around the city map and explore a large variety of events.
The game's world is full of hot chicks and MILFs.
All of them—from a simple waitress to the city's mayor—have their own character and unique charm.

Can you become the guy who get all of the beauties?

Most of them won't like you from the start since you're just an average guy with your own perks and disadvantages, and some of those chicks have a lot of power and money.
Still, you have all the tools to change their opinion and make them fall in love with you!

THE GAME FEATURES

  • 14 hot chicks and sexy MILFs!
  • Lifelike characters with animated eyes
  • Controllable, multi-angle camera inside the animated scenes
  • A smartphone function that lets you make photos and exchange videos.
  • A map of the city at your discretion. Go wherever you want!
  • A branching story that will keep you entertained for at least 10 hours.
  • All of the game's assets are made by real people with no AI involvement.

data.short_description: Breeze of Passion is an adult game about a young guy who moves to a small seaside town to help revive a hotel. This VN is full of beautiful girls, hot MILFs, and unexpected plot twists, along with high-quality graphics and hot animation
data.supported_languages: 英文, 德文, 俄文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 法文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 簡體中文, 義大利文, 捷克文, 阿拉伯文, 波蘭文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • 儲存空間: 8 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS X 10.6 or later
  • 處理器: Intel based or M1 under Rosetta
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • 儲存空間: 8 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: SteamOS or Latest Ubuntu LTS
  • 處理器: Processor 64-bit quad core 1.6 Ghz (CPU or APU)
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Intel HD 4000
  • 儲存空間: 8 GB 可用空間
